nasb.text: They *came to the house of the synagogue official; and He *saw a commotion, and people loudly weeping and wailing.

esv.text: They came to the house of the ruler of the synagogue, and Jesus saw a commotion, people weeping and wailing loudly.

cnv.text: 他們來到會堂主管的家，耶穌看見許多人哭泣哀號，一片混亂，

ccb.text: 他们到了那里，只见在场的人嚎啕大哭，场面混乱。

csbs.text: 他们来到会堂主管的家里，耶稣看见一片混乱，有人哭泣，有人哀号。
